serverInfo.name: scomp-link
serverInfo.description: End-to-end ML toolkit: train models, tune hyperparameters, detect drift, generate HTML reports with 39 chart types, detect anomalies, forecast time series, check fairness, and serve models as REST APIs. 15 MCP tools for zero-code machine learning.

tools.name: describe_data
tools.description: Profile a dataset (columns, dtypes, missing%, stats)

tools.name: train_model
tools.description: Train a model (regression/classification) with optional tuning

tools.name: validate_model
tools.description: Evaluate model on test data with metrics + HTML report

tools.name: detect_drift
tools.description: Check distribution drift between datasets (PSI + KS test)

tools.name: detect_anomalies
tools.description: Multi-method anomaly detection (IForest, LOF, TabNet, Transformer)

tools.name: check_fairness
tools.description: Fairness metrics (demographic parity, disparate impact, equalized odds)

tools.name: engineer_features
tools.description: Automated feature engineering (interactions, log, dates, target encoding)

tools.name: generate_report
tools.description: Create interactive HTML EDA or model report

tools.name: create_visualization
tools.description: Generate a chart (39 types: RAWGraphs SVG, Plotly, Highcharts)
